description: An accountant needs to reconcile the prepaid expenses general ledger account to its supporting sub-ledger or schedule.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the month-end balance of the 'Prepaid Expenses' account from the general ledger.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the GL account balance.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the detailed prepaid expenses schedule, which lists all prepaid items and their remaining balances.
Compare the total of the supporting schedule to the general ledger balance and confirm they match.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the two balances reconcile.
